name: CVF Dispatch Quality Reviewer
purpose: Provide deterministic dispatch-quality validation of work-order and baseline artifacts before worker execution begins.
useWhen: A dispatcher or reviewer must verify that a work-order and baseline pair satisfy all dispatch-quality gates before worker execution.
doNotUseWhen: Worker execution is already in progress; do not re-validate mid-execution. Do not use as a substitute for the full pre-implementation autorun gate.
executionConstraints: read-only filesystem access; no provider calls; no commits; no session-sync edits
authorityCeiling: read-only inspection of governed markdown files
permissions: read governed markdown files under docs/ and governance/
rollback: N/A with reason: read-only; no filesystem mutation
safeStop: return failing gate verdict and exit non-zero; no cleanup required
capabilityBoundary: no commit, no provider call, no runtime activation, no external-agent adapter, no session-sync
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to commit, activate, execute, or expand external-agent scope
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not yet authored; separate ASSF adapter work order required
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in ASSF-T2
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required; pure Python
